label: Can /design command wrappers enforce least-privilege tools by mode instead of granting Write/Edit/Bash to every mode?
Current /design wrappers grant Write/Edit/Bash uniformly, including the four read-and-guide modes
The interface, foundations, motion and audit mode packets omit Write/Edit/Bash while md-generator includes them
mode-registry separates reference-base from playwright-extract backends but carries no command tool policy
impeccable-main uses metadata-first command descriptions and constrained script tool grants rather than blanket raw write/edit access
A /design command wrapper must not grant mutating tools unless its bound mode declares workspace artifact production

direction: Prose-only instruction telling read-and-guide modes not to edit while keeping Write/Edit/Bash granted
reason: Once the wrapper grants mutating tools, non-mutation is advisory rather than deterministic; the enforceable fix is frontmatter parity or generated wrapper checking.

focus: [D2-13/D2] /design:* allowed-tools over-grant (all grant Write/Edit/Bash though 4 modes are read-and-guide) (corpus: impeccable-main)
